options.name: -noOverwrite
options.description: continue to display the previous 2-pin-chains also. Default: false

options.name: -output
options.description: 2-pin nets will be traced and dumped in this file. Default: stdout

options.name: -reset
options.description: just remove all gui markers and gui objects, created during previous invocations. No two pin chain reporting. Default: false

options.name: -showAll
options.description: display the intermediate instances of the chain also. Default: false

options.name: -strict
options.description: strictly two pin chain even at module port connections. Default: false

options.name: -through
options.description: specify list of names of net, instterms, hinstterms for which 2-pin chains is to be traced and dumped

options.name: -tolerance
options.description: treat this much difference in ordinates as still aligned.Default: 1.0 (microns)
